home.eyebrow: House of sealed drops · premium watchmaking
home.title: One piece. One price. Set at the reveal.
home.intro: Each week, a house opens a drop. You seal your bid. The highest bids win, and all pay the same price: that of the last winning bid. No overbidding, no price war.
home.mechanismDetail: The mechanism in detail, with a worked example →
home.manifesto: Not a marketplace. One house, one piece, one appointment: Thursday, 6 PM.
home.manifestoSub: Direct from the houses, no resale, no middleman. Insured delivery, verified identity, 14-day withdrawal. No buyer fees.
home.emptyKicker: The next rendez-vous is taking shape
home.emptyTitle: One house, one piece, one price.
home.emptySub: Every Thursday at 6 PM, a house opens a drop. Sealed bids until the reveal, then a single price for every winner.

mecanisme.metaDescription: Sealed bid, reveal, single price: how a Drop No. drop works, with a worked example.
mecanisme.heroTitle: A fair price is born sealed.
mecanisme.heroBody: No live auctions, no race against the clock. Each person seals the bid the piece is worth to them; at the reveal, the highest win and all pay the same price.

example.title: Five pieces, seven bids.
example.body: A house opens a drop of {n} pieces, floor price {floor}. At the reveal, the bids are sorted. The {n} highest win, and all pay the amount of the {n}th: {clearing}. Bidding higher never raises your bill, only your chances.

open.title: Opening
open.body: The drop opens: piece, pieces available and floor price are public. The bidding window lasts five days.

sealed.title: Sealed bids
sealed.body: You seal your bid, hidden from everyone, editable at will until one hour before the reveal.

lock.title: Lock
lock.body: The bids are frozen. No further submission or change: the sorting can begin.

reveal.title: Reveal
reveal.body: The winners are notified and all pay the same price. The other pre-authorisations are released.

lose.q: What happens if I don't win?
lose.a: Nothing. The pre-authorisation placed on your card is released as quickly as possible and you are charged nothing. Taking part costs nothing.

preauth.a: It ensures every bid is genuine: the exact amount of your bid is held on your card, without any charge. If you win, only the single price (often lower than your bid) is captured. Otherwise, everything is released.

identity.a: European regulation on luxury goods (anti-money-laundering) requires verifying buyers' identity. It is done once, through Stripe Identity: an ID document, a selfie, a few minutes.

edit.a: Yes, as many times as you like, until one hour before the reveal. Past that lock, the bids are frozen.

winners.q: How much do the winners pay, exactly?
winners.a: All winners pay the same amount: that of the last winning bid, the lowest among those retained. If you bid more, you still pay this single price, never your own amount.

withdraw.q: And if I change my mind after delivery?
withdraw.a: You have the European right of withdrawal: 14 days after receipt, full refund, with no restocking fee.

fees.q: What does Drop No. cost the buyer?
fees.a: Nothing. No buyer fees: the single price shown is the price paid. The platform's commission is borne by the house.

cta.title: The next drop is already on the calendar.

about.metaDescription: Drop No. is a house of sealed drops for premium watches, direct from the brands.
about.title: A house of sealed drops.
about.para1: Every Thursday at 6 PM, Drop No. brings together a house and a single piece. A limited number of examples, a floor price, a five-day bidding window. Every drop is numbered, awaited, made into a ritual.
about.para2Lead: You submit a hidden bid, adjustable until the final hour. At the reveal, the highest bids prevail and
about.para2Emphasis: every winner pays the same price
about.para2Tail: : that of the last bid accepted. No real-time overbidding, no price war. A calendar you can keep.
about.para3: We work directly with the brands. No resale, no middleman: authenticity comes from the house itself. Your piece is delivered insured, hand to hand when its value calls for it.
about.contactLead: Drop No. is published from Brussels. For any question, write to us at

serialOffer.body: A personal offer awaits you. It expires soon.

bidsSection.title: My bids
bidsSection.empty: You have not submitted a bid yet.

kycBlock.verified: Your identity is verified. You may seal a bid on any drop.
kycBlock.verifying: Verification in progress. You will be notified as soon as it is complete, usually within a few minutes.
kycBlock.pendingBody: Identity verification (ID document and selfie via Stripe) is required before your first bid. Once verified, you can bid for life.
kycBlock.rejectedBody: The last verification did not succeed. Try again with a legible ID document, or contact support.

accountVerification.title: Verify your identity.
accountVerification.intro: For pieces of this value, the law requires us to confirm who you are before your first bid. It is quick, secured by Stripe, and valid once and for all.

id.label: Identity document
id.desc: ID card or passport, photographed live.

selfie.label: Selfie
selfie.desc: A short selfie to confirm it is really you.

confirm.label: Confirmation
confirm.desc: Verified within minutes. Valid for every drop.

verified.body: Everything is in order. You can seal a bid on any open drop.

verifying.body: Stripe is reviewing your documents. You will receive an email once it is finalised, usually within a few minutes. You can close this page.

pending.title: Ready to verify
pending.body: Have your identity document at hand. Verification takes place on a secure Stripe page, then you return here.
pending.bodyRejected: The last verification did not go through. Start again with a legible, well-lit identity document, or contact support.

accountOffer.paymentIncomplete: The payment could not be completed. Please try again.

waitlist.name: La Liste
waitlist.tagline: You don’t subscribe. You’re let in.
waitlist.heroBody: One house, one piece, a single price set at the reveal, every Thursday at 6 PM. Add your name and the next drop reaches you before it goes public.
waitlist.perkFirstBody: Each drop reaches you before it opens to the public.
waitlist.perkRitualBody: One piece, one price, at 6 PM. Nothing more.
waitlist.perkQuietBody: One email when it matters. Unsubscribe in one click.
waitlist.footerBody: The next drop reaches you before anyone else. Nothing else.
waitlist.consent: I agree to receive Drop No.’s drop announcements. Unsubscribe anytime.
waitlist.successBody: You’re on La Liste. We’ll write before anyone else.

waitlist.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notFound.title: This page does not exist.
notFound.lede: The link may have expired, or the piece you were looking for has already been revealed. Nothing is lost: the next drop is waiting for you.

runtime.title: Something stopped short.
runtime.lede: An unexpected error happened on our side. Any bids you have placed remain saved and valid. Please try again in a moment.

forbidden.title: This page is private.
forbidden.lede: You do not have the rights to view this page. If you believe this is a mistake, sign in or write to us.

global.title: Something went wrong.
global.lede: The site ran into an unexpected incident. Any bids you have placed remain saved and valid. Reload the page to continue.

maintenance.title: We will be back shortly.
maintenance.lede: The site is briefly down for maintenance. We are putting the finishing touches to the experience.
maintenance.reassure: Your bid remains saved and valid. No action is needed on your part.
